curation_notes: Patch commit 930fef7 is the merge of PR #1180 which fixes CVE-2024-53677 on the 2-3-x branch. It modifies only FileUploadInterceptor.java (+12/-9 lines). The fix renames putCaseInsensitive to putWithCheck and changes the parameter matching from equalsIgnoreCase to contains, preventing OGNL expression prefixes (e.g., 'top.uploadFileName') from bypassing parameter sanitization. The pre-assigned vulnerability class path-traversal is correct per the advisory description and CWE-22. Locations derived from the patch diff: the intercept method where vulnerable putCaseInsensitive calls are made, and the putCaseInsensitive method itself which has the insufficient equality check.
